# xFinance Rental AI (MCP handoff)

> Public landing for the white-label **Rental AI** HTTP API — use with agents, MCP tool descriptors, or OpenAPI-aware clients.

**Product & production API host:** [atx.fintech-advisor.ai](https://atx.fintech-advisor.ai/)

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md) — API overview, auth, quickstart
- [openapi/rental-ai.yaml](openapi/rental-ai.yaml) — OpenAPI 3.1, tag `rental-ai` only
- [examples/](examples/) — copy-paste curl / minimal scripts

## Live spec (production)

`GET https://atx.fintech-advisor.ai/api/openapi` — full generated inventory; filter **rental-ai**.

## Private implementation

Source of truth for routes and billing: monorepo **`atx-trusted-advisor`**  
 Maintainer checkout: `atx-trusted-advisor`  
 Deep-dive: `atx-docs/MCP-AI-ADVISOR.md`
